title: K-200 Comms/Datalink Qualification Test Report
text:
# K-200 Comms/Datalink Qualification Test Report

Document number: MD-DOC-490-B. Revision: B. Type: test-report. Author: Tyler Moss. Created: 2024-08-07. Last modified: 2025-01-19. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Comms/Datalink subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1077, P-1061, P-1025.
